senses.gloss: to help, to assist, to aid, to support
what is apparent (as opposed to what is unseen, invisible)

examples.text: بَاطِنُهُ فِيهِ الرَّحْمَةُ وَظَاهِرُهُ مِن قِبَلِهِ الْعَذَابُ
examples.english: On the near side will be grace and on the far side will be torment.

etymology.text: Derived from the active participle of ظَهَرَ (ẓahara).
